{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Era
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Era]] is a [[Truegold priestess]] and [[Maraan]]'s second-in-command.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Era]] identified [[Lindon]]'s full name as [[Lindon Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
